sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_keys (key_id INT PRIMARY KEY, session_key VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_keys (key_id, session_key) VALUES (1, xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('ses_key'));
UPDATE test_keys SET session_key = xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('new_ses_key') WHERE key_id = 1;
SELECT key_id, session_key FROM test_keys WHERE session_key IS NOT NULL;
DELETE FROM test_keys WHERE key_id = 1 AND session_key = xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('ses_key');
